hyperedges.label: SpaceTraders app: api + webui deployments, their services, and shared config
EBI-CS app: api + frontend deployments and their services in namespace ebi-cs-api
Flux GitOps bootstrap (source + root sync + controllers)
Ingresses reusing the ebi-cs-api-tls TLS secret
Ingress manifests aggregated by the ingress Kustomization
Helm chart sources feeding infrastructure HelmReleases
Per-app Namespaces enforcing pod-security baseline isolation

nodes.label: Graphify Knowledge Graph
nodes.rationale: Project uses a persistent graphify knowledge graph (graphify-out/) with god nodes, community structure and cross-file relationships; codebase questions should query it before raw grep, and the graph is refreshed AST-only via 'graphify update .' to avoid API cost.

nodes.label: AiUsageMonitor Deployment Notes
nodes.rationale: Documents required 1Password vault items (aiusagemonitor-secrets, mail-secret, ghcr-login) with exact field names so .NET envFrom binding works; notes that making the GHCR package public removes the need for the ghcr-login secret entirely.

nodes.label: CronJob aiusagemonitor
nodes.rationale: Runs hourly (schedule '0 * * * *') with concurrencyPolicy Forbid so overlapping AI-usage collection runs cannot pile up.

nodes.label: ServiceAccount default (aiusagemonitor)
nodes.rationale: ghcr-login imagePullSecret is attached to the default ServiceAccount so new pods in this app do not each need their own imagePullSecrets block.

nodes.label: Deployment armabotcs
nodes.rationale: No HTTP probes are defined because this is a Discord bot with no HTTP server; Kubernetes restarts the pod if the dotnet process exits.

nodes.label: Flux Kustomization: apps
nodes.rationale: Flux Kustomization reconciling path ./apps; dependsOn infrastructure so apps apply only after infrastructure is ready.

nodes.label: Flux Kustomization: configuration
nodes.rationale: Flux Kustomization reconciling path ./configuration; dependsOn infrastructure.

nodes.label: Flux Kustomization: infrastructure
nodes.rationale: Flux Kustomization reconciling path ./infrastructure; dependsOn repos. Central dependency: apps, configuration, ingress and system-upgrade-plans all depend on it.

nodes.label: Flux Kustomization: ingress
nodes.rationale: Flux Kustomization reconciling path ./ingress; dependsOn both infrastructure and apps, so it applies last after workloads exist.

nodes.label: Flux Kustomization: namespaces
nodes.rationale: Flux Kustomization reconciling path ./namespaces; has no dependsOn so it is the root of the reconciliation ordering.

nodes.label: Flux Kustomization: repos
nodes.rationale: Flux Kustomization reconciling path ./repos (Helm/Git repositories); dependsOn namespaces.

nodes.label: Flux Kustomization: system-upgrade-plans
nodes.rationale: Flux Kustomization reconciling path ./infrastructure/system-upgrade-plans; dependsOn infrastructure.

nodes.label: GitRepository: flux-system (root source)
nodes.rationale: Single Git source (ssh github Gemberkoekje/gembernodes, branch main) referenced as sourceRef by every Flux Kustomization in the cluster.

nodes.label: Flux Kustomization: flux-system (root sync)
nodes.rationale: Root sync Kustomization reconciling path ./clusters/home; entrypoint that pulls in every other cluster-root Flux Kustomization.

nodes.label: Flux Controllers Bootstrap (gotk-components)
nodes.rationale: Flux-generated bootstrap of the FluxCD controllers (source, kustomize, helm, notification) and CRDs that execute all reconciliation.

nodes.label: Kustomize overlay: flux-system
nodes.rationale: Kustomize overlay bundling gotk-components.yaml and gotk-sync.yaml as the Flux bootstrap unit.

nodes.label: Deployment: sts2viewer
nodes.rationale: Single-replica ASP.NET app (ghcr.io/gemberkoekje/sts2viewer) on port 8080; pulls ghcr image via ghcr-login secret and reads sts2viewer-secrets for DB and LLM keys.

nodes.label: Service: sts2viewer-service
nodes.rationale: ClusterIP Service selecting app=sts2viewer, exposing port 80 to targetPort 8080.

nodes.label: OnePasswordItem: ghcr-login
nodes.rationale: OnePasswordItem materialising the ghcr-login imagePullSecret from vault Gembercluster.

nodes.label: Kustomize overlay: sts2viewer
nodes.rationale: Kustomize overlay aggregating the sts2viewer deployment, service, ghcr-login and sts2viewer-secrets resources.

nodes.label: Deployment: vortexplotboek
nodes.rationale: PlotboekGenerator .NET web app from GitLab registry on port 8080; consumes Postgres, Discord, OAuth (Google/Microsoft), Gemini and sync-api-key secrets.

nodes.label: Service: vortexplotboek-service
nodes.rationale: NodePort Service selecting app=vortexplotboek, exposing port 80 to targetPort 8080.

nodes.label: CronJob: sync-google-drive
nodes.rationale: Hourly CronJob (curl image) that POSTs to the vortexplotboek service sync endpoint using the sync-api-key secret.

nodes.label: Kustomize overlay: vortexplotboek
nodes.rationale: Kustomize overlay aggregating the vortexplotboek deployment, service, cronjob and secret resources.

nodes.label: ClusterIssuer: letsencrypt-prod
nodes.rationale: cert-manager ClusterIssuer using ACME Let's Encrypt production with HTTP01 solver on ingressClass nginx-public.

nodes.label: MetalLB IPAddressPool: first-pool
nodes.rationale: MetalLB IPAddressPool allocating 192.168.1.230-239 for LoadBalancer services.

nodes.label: MetalLB L2Advertisement: l2lbadv
nodes.rationale: MetalLB L2Advertisement advertising first-pool over layer-2.

nodes.label: Kustomize overlay: configuration
nodes.rationale: Kustomize overlay bundling ipaddresspool.yaml and certissuer.yaml; the target reconciled by the configuration Flux Kustomization.

nodes.label: GitOps reconciliation order
nodes.rationale: Cross-cutting idea: the dependsOn chain namespaces -> repos -> infrastructure -> {apps, configuration, system-upgrade-plans} -> ingress encodes apply ordering across the cluster.

nodes.label: cert-manager HelmRelease
nodes.rationale: Flux HelmRelease installing cert-manager (chart 1.x from jetstack) with CRDs into the cert-manager namespace for TLS certificate management.

nodes.label: certmanager Kustomization
nodes.rationale: Kustomize overlay aggregating the cert-manager HelmRelease.

nodes.label: connect (1Password Connect) HelmRelease
nodes.rationale: Flux HelmRelease installing the 1Password 'connect' chart (1.8.1) with operator enabled to back external secrets.

nodes.label: externalsecrets Kustomization
nodes.rationale: Kustomize overlay aggregating the 1Password connect HelmRelease.

nodes.label: kured HelmRelease
nodes.rationale: Flux HelmRelease installing kured (chart 5.x) for automatic node reboots, constrained to a 02:00-05:00 window with control-plane tolerations.

nodes.label: kured Kustomization
nodes.rationale: Kustomize overlay aggregating the kured HelmRelease.

nodes.label: infrastructure Kustomization (aggregator)
nodes.rationale: Top-level Kustomization aggregating all infrastructure subdirectories into the GitOps infrastructure layer.

nodes.label: metallb Kustomization
nodes.rationale: Kustomize overlay aggregating the MetalLB HelmRelease.

nodes.label: metallb HelmRelease
nodes.rationale: Flux HelmRelease installing MetalLB (chart 0.14.x) providing bare-metal LoadBalancer service IPs.

nodes.label: grafana-alerting-provisioning ConfigMap
nodes.rationale: ConfigMap provisioning Grafana contact points (email), notification policies, and a Loki-based error-log alert rule (datasourceUid grafana-loki).

nodes.label: grafana-internal Ingress
nodes.rationale: Ingress exposing Grafana at /grafana via nginx-public ingressClass, whitelisted to internal RFC1918 source ranges.

nodes.label: grafana HelmRelease
nodes.rationale: Flux HelmRelease installing Grafana (chart 8.x) with Prometheus + Loki datasources, qnap-nfs persistence, SMTP, and alerting provisioning ConfigMap mount.

nodes.label: kube-state-metrics HelmRelease
nodes.rationale: Flux HelmRelease installing kube-state-metrics from prometheus-community; exposes Kubernetes object metrics scraped by Prometheus. Note: not listed in monitoring kustomization resources.

nodes.label: monitoring Kustomization
nodes.rationale: Kustomize overlay aggregating the monitoring/observability stack resources (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Promtail, ingress, secrets, alerting).

nodes.label: grafana-loki HelmRelease
nodes.rationale: Flux HelmRelease installing Loki (chart 6.x) in SingleBinary mode with filesystem storage on loki-qnap PVC; log aggregation backend.

nodes.label: prometheus HelmRelease
nodes.rationale: Flux HelmRelease installing Prometheus (chart 25.x, prometheus-community) with qnap-nfs persistent storage; alertmanager and pushgateway disabled.

nodes.label: promtail HelmRelease
nodes.rationale: Flux HelmRelease installing Promtail (chart 6.x) that scrapes pod logs and ships them to grafana-loki push endpoint.

nodes.label: nfs-provisioner Kustomization
nodes.rationale: Kustomize overlay aggregating the NFS CSI driver HelmRelease and the qnap-nfs StorageClass.

nodes.label: csi-driver-nfs HelmRelease
nodes.rationale: Flux HelmRelease installing the NFS CSI driver (chart 4.x) providing the nfs.csi.k8s.io provisioner for dynamic NFS volumes.

nodes.label: qnap-nfs StorageClass
nodes.rationale: StorageClass using nfs.csi.k8s.io against QNAP NAS (192.168.1.211:/gembernodes-pvcs); the cluster's default persistent storage backend.

nodes.label: nginx Kustomization
nodes.rationale: Kustomize overlay aggregating the nginx ingress controller HelmRelease.

nodes.label: nginx-ingress-public HelmRelease
nodes.rationale: Flux HelmRelease installing ingress-nginx (chart 4.x) exposing the nginx-public ingressClass on LoadBalancer IP 192.168.1.230.

nodes.label: postgresql-backup CronJob
nodes.rationale: Daily (02:00) CronJob running pg_dumpall against postgresql.flux-system, gzipping to the backup PVC and rotating to keep the last 7 dumps.

nodes.label: postgresql-backup-pvc-qnap PVC
nodes.rationale: 5Gi PersistentVolumeClaim on the qnap-nfs StorageClass holding PostgreSQL dump archives.

nodes.label: postgresql-backup Kustomization
nodes.rationale: Kustomize overlay aggregating the PostgreSQL backup PVC and CronJob.

nodes.label: Observability Stack
nodes.rationale: Cross-cutting monitoring/observability system: metrics (Prometheus + kube-state-metrics), logs (Promtail -> Loki), and visualization/alerting (Grafana).

nodes.label: PostgreSQL Data PVC (postgresql-data-qnap)
nodes.rationale: 32Gi ReadWriteOnce claim on qnap-nfs providing durable storage for the PostgreSQL primary.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL LoadBalancer Service
nodes.rationale: Exposes PostgreSQL on port 5432 at a fixed LoadBalancer IP 192.168.1.232 for external access.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL HelmRelease
nodes.rationale: Deploys the Bitnami PostgreSQL chart with memory bounded for small clusters and an existing qnap PVC.

nodes.label: k3s Server Upgrade Plan
nodes.rationale: Automates k3s upgrades on control-plane nodes by cordoning and tracking the stable release channel.

nodes.label: k3s Agent Upgrade Plan
nodes.rationale: Automates k3s upgrades on non-control-plane (agent) nodes, preparing only after the k3s-server plan completes.

nodes.label: System Upgrade Controller Kustomization
nodes.rationale: Installs the upstream Rancher system-upgrade-controller that reconciles the k3s upgrade Plans.

nodes.label: Persistent Storage Layer (qnap-nfs)
nodes.rationale: Cross-cutting idea: all stateful workloads persist data via ReadWriteOnce claims on the shared qnap-nfs storage class.

nodes.label: AdventureEngine Ingress
nodes.rationale: nginx-public Ingress in namespace adventureengine. Hosts gemberkoekje.nl (path /adventureengine) and adventureengine.gemberkoekje.nl (path /). TLS secret ebi-cs-api-tls via cert-manager ClusterIssuer letsencrypt-prod, ssl-redirect true. Routes to backend Service adventureengine-service:80.

nodes.label: COV Website Ingress
nodes.rationale: nginx-public Ingress in namespace cov-website. Hosts gemberkoekje.nl (path /cov-website) and cov-website.gemberkoekje.nl (path /). TLS secret ebi-cs-api-tls via ClusterIssuer letsencrypt-prod. Routes to backend Service cov-website-service:80.

nodes.label: Curatool Ingress
nodes.rationale: nginx-public Ingress in namespace curatool. Hosts gemberkoekje.nl (path /curatool) and curatool.gemberkoekje.nl (path /). TLS secret ebi-cs-api-tls via ClusterIssuer letsencrypt-prod. Routes to backend Service curatool:80 (defined in apps/curatool/web-service.yaml).

nodes.label: EBI CS API Ingress
nodes.rationale: nginx-public Ingress in namespace ebi-cs-api. Hosts gemberkoekje.nl (path /ebi-cs-api) and ebi-cs-api.gemberkoekje.nl (path /). TLS secret ebi-cs-api-tls (the shared default secret) via ClusterIssuer letsencrypt-prod. Routes to backend Service ebi-cs-api-service:80.

nodes.label: EBI CS Frontend Ingress
nodes.rationale: nginx-public Ingress in namespace ebi-cs-api. Hosts gemberkoekje.nl (regex path /ebi-frontend(/|$)(.*)) and ebi-frontend.gemberkoekje.nl. Uses use-regex and rewrite-target /$2 with ImplementationSpecific paths. TLS secret ebi-cs-frontend-tls via ClusterIssuer letsencrypt-prod. Routes to backend Service ebi-cs-frontend-service:80.

nodes.label: File Server Ingress
nodes.rationale: nginx-public Ingress named file-server-ingress in namespace file-server. Hosts gemberkoekje.nl (path /fileserver) and fileserver.gemberkoekje.nl (path /). proxy-body-size 200m for large uploads. TLS secret ebi-cs-api-tls via ClusterIssuer letsencrypt-prod. Routes to backend Service file-server:80.

nodes.label: Grafana Ingress
nodes.rationale: nginx-public Ingress named grafana in namespace monitoring. Hosts gemberkoekje.nl (path /grafana) and grafana.gemberkoekje.nl (path /). TLS secret grafana-tls via ClusterIssuer letsencrypt-prod. Routes to Service grafana:80 created by the monitoring HelmRelease (infrastructure/monitoring/grafana-release.yaml), not an apps/ Service.

nodes.label: Hacker Minigames Ingress
nodes.rationale: nginx-public Ingress in namespace hackerminigames. Hosts gemberkoekje.nl (path /hackerminigames) and hackerminigames.gemberkoekje.nl (path /). TLS secret ebi-cs-api-tls via ClusterIssuer letsencrypt-prod. Routes to backend Service hackerminigames-service:80.

nodes.label: Cluster Healthcheck Ingress
nodes.rationale: nginx-public Ingress in namespace cluster-healthcheck. Hosts gemberkoekje.nl (path /healthcheck) and healthcheck.gemberkoekje.nl (path /). TLS secret ebi-cs-api-tls via ClusterIssuer letsencrypt-prod. Routes to backend Service cluster-healthcheck on named port http.

nodes.label: Ingress Kustomization
nodes.rationale: Kustomize aggregator that lists and applies all 13 Ingress manifests in the ingress/ directory as a single resource set.

nodes.label: SpaceTraders Assets Ingress
nodes.rationale: nginx-public Ingress in namespace spacetraders serving static asset paths under host gemberkoekje.nl (/spacetraders/css, /js, /lib, /favicon.ico, /SpaceTraders.App.styles.css) and host spacetraders-assets.gemberkoekje.nl (path /). TLS secret ebi-cs-api-tls via ClusterIssuer letsencrypt-prod. All paths route to backend Service spacetraders-app-service:80.

nodes.label: SpaceTraders Ingress
nodes.rationale: nginx-public Ingress in namespace spacetraders. Host gemberkoekje.nl fans out: /spacetraders/api -> spacetraders-api-service, /spacetraders/dashboard -> spacetraders-webui-service, /spacetraders -> spacetraders-app-service. Host spacetraders.gemberkoekje.nl (path /) -> spacetraders-app-service. TLS secret ebi-cs-api-tls via ClusterIssuer letsencrypt-prod.

nodes.label: STS2 Viewer Ingress
nodes.rationale: nginx-public Ingress in namespace sts2viewer. Hosts gemberkoekje.nl (regex path /sts2viewer(/|$)(.*)) and sts2viewer.gemberkoekje.nl. Uses rewrite-target /$2 with ImplementationSpecific paths. TLS secret ebi-cs-api-tls via ClusterIssuer letsencrypt-prod. Routes to backend Service sts2viewer-service:80.

nodes.label: Vortexplotboek Ingress
nodes.rationale: nginx-public Ingress in namespace vortexplotboek. Hosts gemberkoekje.nl (path /vortexplotboek) and vortexplotboek.gemberkoekje.nl (path /). Enlarged proxy-buffer-size 32k / proxy-buffers-number 4 to fit large OIDC SaveTokens auth cookies on /signin-oidc (avoids nginx 502). TLS secret ebi-cs-api-tls via ClusterIssuer letsencrypt-prod. Routes to backend Service vortexplotboek-service:80.

nodes.label: External HTTP Routing / TLS Termination
nodes.rationale: Cross-cutting concept: all ingress manifests share the nginx-public ingressClassName, terminate TLS via cert-manager ClusterIssuer letsencrypt-prod, force ssl-redirect, and expose services under the gemberkoekje.nl apex plus a per-app <app>.gemberkoekje.nl subdomain.

nodes.label: Namespaces Kustomization (aggregator)
nodes.rationale: Flux Kustomization that aggregates all per-app Namespace manifests into one applied set.

nodes.label: Repos Kustomization (aggregator)
nodes.rationale: Flux Kustomization aggregating all HelmRepository/OCIRepository chart source definitions.

nodes.label: onepassword HelmRepository (1Password Connect charts)
nodes.rationale: Chart source at https://1password.github.io/connect-helm-charts for the 1Password Connect release.

nodes.label: grafana HelmRepository
nodes.rationale: Chart source https://grafana.github.io/helm-charts in the monitoring namespace.

nodes.label: metallb HelmRepository
nodes.rationale: Chart source https://metallb.github.io/metallb for the MetalLB load-balancer release.

nodes.label: postgresql-chart OCIRepository (Bitnami)
nodes.rationale: OCI chart source oci://registry-1.docker.io/bitnamicharts/postgresql pinned to tag 18.5.14.

nodes.label: prometheus-community HelmRepository
nodes.rationale: Chart source https://prometheus-community.github.io/helm-charts in the monitoring namespace.

nodes.label: ingress-nginx-charts HelmRepository
nodes.rationale: Chart source https://kubernetes.github.io/ingress-nginx for the ingress-nginx release.

nodes.label: jetstack HelmRepository (cert-manager charts)
nodes.rationale: Chart source https://charts.jetstack.io supplying the cert-manager chart.

nodes.label: kured HelmRepository
nodes.rationale: Chart source https://kubereboot.github.io/charts for the Kured reboot daemon release.

nodes.label: csi-driver-nfs HelmRepository
nodes.rationale: Chart source (kubernetes-csi/csi-driver-nfs master charts) for the NFS CSI driver release.

nodes.label: Helm chart sources
nodes.rationale: Cross-cutting idea: HelmRepository/OCIRepository objects are the upstream chart sources that infrastructure HelmReleases pull from.

nodes.label: Namespace isolation per app
nodes.rationale: Cross-cutting idea: each app/component runs in its own dedicated Namespace, most with pod-security baseline enforcement.

links.rationale: sts2viewer overlay lives under the ./apps path reconciled by the apps Flux Kustomization.
vortexplotboek overlay lives under the ./apps path reconciled by the apps Flux Kustomization.
sourceRef GitRepository flux-system.
dependsOn encodes apply ordering: apps reconcile only after infrastructure.
root sync path ./clusters/home reconciles this cluster-root Kustomization file.
dependsOn encodes apply ordering: ingress after apps so routes target existing services.
sourceRef GitRepository flux-system.
dependsOn encodes apply ordering: configuration after infrastructure.
path ./configuration points the Flux Kustomization at the configuration kustomize overlay.
root sync path ./clusters/home reconciles this cluster-root Kustomization file.
root sync path ./clusters/home reconciles this cluster-root Kustomization file.
sourceRef GitRepository flux-system.
dependsOn encodes apply ordering: infrastructure after repos.
dependsOn encodes apply ordering: ingress after infrastructure.
dependsOn encodes apply ordering: system-upgrade-plans after infrastructure.
root sync path ./clusters/home reconciles this cluster-root Kustomization file.
sourceRef GitRepository flux-system.
root sync path ./clusters/home reconciles this cluster-root Kustomization file.
sourceRef GitRepository flux-system.
dependsOn encodes apply ordering: repos after namespaces.
root sync path ./clusters/home reconciles this cluster-root Kustomization file.
sourceRef GitRepository flux-system.
root sync path ./clusters/home reconciles this cluster-root Kustomization file.
sourceRef GitRepository flux-system.
sourceRef points the root sync at the flux-system GitRepository.
resources list includes gotk-sync.yaml which declares the GitRepository.
resources list includes gotk-sync.yaml which declares the root sync Kustomization.
The root sync is the origin from which the dependsOn ordering concept unfolds.
resources list includes gotk-components.yaml.
imagePullSecrets references the ghcr-login secret to pull the ghcr.io image.
Both are single-replica .NET web app Deployments on port 8080 with dropped-capabilities securityContext, health probes and secret-backed env, differing mainly in registry and secrets.
resources list includes deployment.yaml.
Service selector app=sts2viewer matches the Deployment pod labels.
resources list includes service.yaml.
resources list includes ghcr-login.yaml.
Both kustomize overlays follow the same deployment+service+secrets app-bundling pattern under ./apps.
resources list includes deployment.yaml.
Service selector app=vortexplotboek matches the Deployment pod labels.
resources list includes vortexplotboek-service.yaml.
CronJob curls http://vortexplotboek-service.vortexplotboek.svc.cluster.local sync endpoint explicitly.
resources list includes sync-cronjob.yaml.
resources list includes certissuer.yaml.
L2Advertisement ipAddressPools lists first-pool.
resources list includes ipaddresspool.yaml declaring first-pool.
resources list includes ipaddresspool.yaml declaring l2lbadv.

hyperedges.label: SpaceTraders app: api + webui deployments, their services, and shared config
EBI-CS app: api + frontend deployments and their services in namespace ebi-cs-api
Flux GitOps bootstrap (source + root sync + controllers)
Ingresses reusing the ebi-cs-api-tls TLS secret
Ingress manifests aggregated by the ingress Kustomization
Helm chart sources feeding infrastructure HelmReleases
Per-app Namespaces enforcing pod-security baseline isolation
